description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

🆕 New (Published: July 8, 2026)

Hanno City Hall will hold staff recruitment information sessions in two formats: in-person and online.

【In-Person Format】
Date and time: Friday, August 7, 2026, 2:30 p.m. to 4:30 p.m.
Location: Hanno City Hall Main Building Annex, 2F Conference Room
Content: Information about city hall work, working conditions, benefits, and the recruitment exam. Includes a roundtable discussion with current employees.
Capacity: About 30 people (first come, first served; applicants with eligible qualifications prioritized)
Registration period: Monday, July 6, 2026, 8:30 a.m. to Monday, August 3, 2026, 5:00 p.m.
How to apply: Apply through the "In-person recruitment information session" link. After completing registration, come directly to the venue on the day.

【Online Format (Zoom)】
Date and time: Friday, July 31, 2026, 3:30 p.m. to 4:45 p.m.
Content: You can join from home or school.
Capacity: About 30 people (first come, first served; applicants with eligible qualifications prioritized)
Registration period: Monday, July 6, 2026, 8:30 a.m. to Saturday, July 27, 2026, 5:00 p.m.
How to apply: Apply through the "Online recruitment information session" link. After the registration period closes, the meeting ID and other details will be sent to your email address.

Target audience: Students and career changers interested in applying to Hanno City Hall. Dress code is casual. Choosing either format will not affect your chances in the selection process.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/somubu/shokuinka/13007.html
summary: ℹ️ Hanno City Hall is holding two staff recruitment information sessions — in-person and online (Zoom)!
